snippet.title: Saturday live with Wess from Appwrite | 20+ years of code
snippet.description: Welcome to another saturday live for coders. Today I am bringing in Wesley Cope. He is currently at Appwrite, building Next Gen Open Source backend as a service. With so much of experience, post your interesting questions, and I will ask him.
